nws_periods.name: Overnight
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms. Some of the storms could be severe. Cloudy, with a low around 65. East wind around 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.

nws_periods.name: Sunday
nws_periods.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms before 1pm. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny, with a high near 84. Southeast wind 10 to 15 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%.
